name: @oahs/gateway
description: Model gateway (Phase 6, roadmap §2.5) — the RUNTIME-LAYER, provider-agnostic bridge between agent runtimes and LLM providers. OpenAI-compatible provider, per-persona routing, token metering for billing. The spine is NEVER a client of the gateway (no LLM in the control loop, §0.1); this package imports no spine package.
